title: ornduffia umbricola
intro: Ornduffia umbricola, a species of flowering plant in the waterlily family, is a native Australian species that thrives in wet environments. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian medicine, with its leaves and roots exhibiting medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ornduffia umbricola include wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of the plant are used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health conditions.
